name: Pulse Rifle
effect: 3-round burst, high accuracy, standard issue. The baseline of Accord precision doctrine.

name: Rail Rifle
effect: Mach 8 tungsten penetrator sniper. Anti-Guardian kinetic round — bypasses energy absorption.

name: Ion Accelerator
effect: Disables all vehicle systems for 3 seconds per hit. No kill power — pure disruption.

name: Shield Generator
effect: Rechargeable energy shield absorbs 80 damage before collapsing. Recharges between engagements.

name: Stealth Coating
effect: Unit becomes invisible when stationary. Effective for ambush, sniping, and forward observation.

name: Marker Light
effect: +15% additional accuracy bonus on any designated target. Stacks with Tactical Link Mark.

name: Tactical Network Hub
effect: Mark bonus +50% effectiveness for all Accord units within 30m of the bearer.

name: Solid-State Tungsten
effect: +20% damage vs Core Guardians. Physical kinetic round — bypasses energy field absorption.

name: Seeker Rounds
effect: Projectiles track and curve toward Marked targets. +30% accuracy against any Marked unit.

name: Predictive Targeting AI
effect: First shot against any new target +50% accuracy. Eliminates Tactical Link's cold-contact weakness.
